return(function(H,f,C,c,Q,n,P,Y,A,T,J,M,N,y,S,j,L,E,R,x,w,l)Y,j,R,L,x,T,N,M,A,w,E,J,y,S,l=function(H)local i,l=-112723-(-112724),H[-520961+520962]while l do
